reason: CIDR range is open to the entire internet (0.0.0.0/0); SSH (port 22) is exposed.
IAM action is a wildcard (*); IAM resource is a wildcard (*).

demo_label: Medium Risk – RDS public but encrypted
Low Risk – private RDS, encrypted, multi-AZ
snippet:
resource "aws_db_instance" "safe" {
  engine                  = "postgres"
  instance_class          = "db.m5.large"
  publicly_accessible     = false
  storage_encrypted       = true
  multi_az                = true
  deletion_protection     = true
  backup_retention_period = 30
}

demo_label: Low Risk – S3 with full public access block
